---
title: "Revealjs Presentation"
---

## M08-Reflection Essay-Advanced Data Types

In this assigment, I learned about new packages and functions, along with their capabilities. The packages are `gtsummary`, `strings`, `factor` and `date-time`.

<div class="fullscreen-btn-wrap">
  <button class="fullscreen-btn" onclick="document.querySelector('.slide-frame').requestFullscreen()">
  ⛶ Fullscreen
  </button>
</div>

<div class="slide-frame">
  <iframe
    src="M08/Camara, Alejandro-M08-Reflection Essay-Adv Data-Types.html"
    width="100%"
    height="500"
    style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 10px;"
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</div>
